body:

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Mob Rule
body:
What is the Capitol Hill Autonomous Zone? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Mob Rule](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-j/)
Mob rule has taken over a major American city. In Seattle, a group of anarchists have taken a police precinct and a considerable portion of the city hostage. In this week's blog, I discuss this radical group's shocking demands which include abolition of the police, courts, and jails, free college, free healthcare, and free housing. How have Seattle's leaders responded to this mob? Will Rule of Law prevail or will this spread to other cities? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Left Now Wants to Abolish the Police](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-d/)
Over the last week, those on the left, and their sympathizers in the mainstream media, have ramped up their radical demand to abolish, defund, dismantle, and even outright ban police departments. In this week's blog, I'll discuss whether reforming law enforcement is warranted. And whether defunding/dismantling police departments is the solution. (Spoiler alert - it's not.) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A One-Two Punch](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-u/)
This past week has been a particular challenging time in our nation's history. A Minneapolis police officer knelt on the neck of an unarmed African-American man named George Floyd, and while the world watched, his life was unnecessarily taken away. Condemnation of the officer's action has been universal. There's no excuse for what this officer did.Protests have arisen in cities all over America, peaceful gatherings that are no doubt our constitutional right. Unfortunately, these protests have been sullied by violence and looting. [In this week's blog](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-o/), I discuss this turmoil and offer some words of hope. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Trump vs Biden](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-p/)
In this week's blog post I discuss the state of the presidential campaign between President Trump and Joe Biden. How has the coronavirus pandemic changed the race? Who do I think will win? And, why is Biden hunkered down in his basement? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjdthtk-kujkulhluu-z/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: =?utf-8?Q?Simona=20Grace?=
subject: Jamaal Bowman Endorsed by Moms in Office Partners Working Hero Action.
body:
AOC, Elizabeth Warren and Leading Progressives Unite in Support of Jamaal Bowman. | | | |
---
|
# Endorsement Alert!
---
| | |
---
| |
> | | | | | Proud to be endorsed by [@WorkingHeroAct](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=9f78445a60&e=3f151f8b74). Their work and dedication to ending poverty is a mission we all need to get behind.
> -[Jamaal Bowman](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5eebf98d3f&e=3f151f8b74)
> ---
| [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=50dc479998&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
### **Hey--**

Today I want to tell you about our friends and partners, Working Hero Action.

With the election just a few months away, it is more important than ever that all progressive leaders and organizations come together across our nation to help elect champions who will fight for you and your family, and for single moms like me.

I founded Moms in Office to remove the barriers that prevent so many women and progressive champions alike from becoming the policymakers we need today.
It is time for our government to reflect the diversity of the American people and this includes women, mothers, people of color, and candidates with a working-class background. We are all fighting for the people who will fight for us and our families in Congress.

I am thankful to you for all of the support you have given me and Moms in Office and I am excited to tell you about the important work of our friends at Working Hero Action.

It is time to come together to get our country back.

Support the work of [Working Hero Action ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=e2a86f6f12&e=3f151f8b74)to elect more leaders like Katie Porter, Jamaal Bowman, J.D. Scholten, and more.

I would not be asking if it weren't so important for our country. But this is an all hands on deck election and now is time to make America work for us and not just the wealthy.

With Gratitude,

Simona Grace

Founder of Moms in Office
Single mom, immigrant, and believer in Equality For All

---
| [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=ed057bf722&e=3f151f8b74)
---
Joe Sanberg is a progressive entrepreneur who is working through both the public and private sectors to end poverty and make people’s lives better. Joe believes that everyone who works – and everyone who wants to but can’t – should be able to afford life’s basic needs and live with financial security.
[https://workingheroaction.org/](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=cf06f58361&e=3f151f8b74)
| [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=7b56138d13&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")

With **30 DAYS** until early voting opens and **50 DAYS** until Election Day we are in a great position to win this, thanks to conservatives like you. **Would you consider chipping in $30 right now to help me continue to get my message out?** [Donate $30](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjrtrx-uunkhiuw-j/) Donate $50 [DONATE OTHER AMOUNT](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkjrtrx-uunkhiuw-t/) Make no mistake, this race is Manny vs. the Machine and I need your help to fight the career politicians. name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Get Out The Vote Rally! - This Saturday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, This Saturday, June 20th, at 10:00 AM we are having a Get Out The Vote Rally! _**Join us at our headquarters located at 6363 Transit Road, Unit 525, Depew, NY 14043 for an in person outdoor rally. **_

_**The elections are now less than a week away and we need to make sure every Republican voter gets out and votes twice for Chris Jacobs on June 23rd.**_ _**[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/wMJKfxJAGyXQKELRLBQ3Pw/aD7WRF0ZV6OBT5im763x892zHw)**_
I'm proud to be _**the only candidate in both elections to have the complete and total endorsement of President Trump**_ and I look forward to joining him in a week in Congress to help him Make America Great Again.

The President and I need your help! _**Come out this Saturday and help us deliver a big win on June 23rd.**_ Together we can send strong, conservative, and experienced leadership to Congress. [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/wMJKfxJAGyXQKELRLBQ3Pw/aD7WRF0ZV6OBT5im763x892zHw) _**I look forward to seeing you on Saturday at 10:00 AM!**_ Thank you for your support!

Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs

name: Tina Ramirez for U.S. Congress
subject: Press Release – TINA RAMIREZ ANNOUNCES CAMPAIGN FINANCE COMMITTEE WITH IMPRESSIVE LIST OF CONSERVATIVE, BUSINESS AND GRASSROOTS LEADERS
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkjdkjdy-udthdyhkil-i/)
| | | _For Immediate Release_
June 17, 2020 _**TINA RAMIREZ ANNOUNCES CAMPAIGN FINANCE COMMITTEE WITH IMPRESSIVE LIST OF CONSERVATIVE, BUSINESS AND GRASSROOTS LEADERS**_ **Midlothian, Virginia** – Republican Tina Ramirez (VA-07) announced a campaign finance committee filled with an all-star cast of business, grassroots and conservative leaders from the Commonwelath and across the nation. The nearly 50-member committee will help guide Ramirez to victory against Spanberger come November. **“I am humbled to have so many great supporters from across the Republican Party on this Committee,”** said Ramirez. **“Our campaign has been fueled by the conservative grassroots, not DC lobbyists or special interests. This Committee represents the momentum we have been feeling on the ground since we announced a year ago. Virginians are ready for a candidate that can beat Democrat Abigail Spanberger. I’m the only candidate who can do that.”** As a first time candidate for public office, Ramirez has raised over $350,000 and has obtained key endorsements from conservative leaders inside Virginia’s 7th congressional district and across the country. **_The Ramirez Finance Committee includes_** : _National leaders_
Gus Bilirakis - Current Florida Congressman (FL 12th district)
Trent Franks - Former Arizona Congressman (AZ 2nd district)
Doug & Jacki Deason - President of the Deason Foundation
Bill Noble - Owner, William Noble Rare Jewels
Orlando Salazar - Member of Latinos for Trump
Loreen Gilbert - President, WealthWise Financial Services
Ron Williams - Retired Secret Service, CEO of Talon Companies
Tatiana Moon - President of Kirov Academy
Deacon Keith Esshaki, Dr. Noori Barka, & Kamal Alsawaf - Members of Chaldean American Community
Darrin Mroz - President of DJM Insurance
Peter & Joy Bohlinger
The Russo Family
Steve & Deb Cleary
Randal & Amy Clark
Ashlee & Kelly Dunagan
Tanveer Ahmed
Guy & Patsy Young _District Delegates_
William H. Hurd - Chesterfield Delegate, Former Solicitor General of Virginia
Craig Stariha - Chesterfield Delegate, Retired Altria Executive
Dr. James & Dodie Anderson - Chesterfield Delegates
Jim & Merri Beth Gibson - Chesterfield delegates, Owner of Mypills2go.com
Dr. Ben Howerton - Henrico Delegate, Chair of The First Freedom Council
Mike Mickel - Henrico Delegate
Pat & Catherine Hughes - Henrico Delegates
Tommy Towers - Henrico delegate, Owner of James River Custom Homes
Sidney Gunst - Powhatan Delegate
Pete & Judy DeChat - Spotsylvania Delegates, Author & Philanthropist
Dr. Rich Breeden (ABD) - Spotsylvania Delegate, Ceo Cyber Safari Inc. _Local Supporters_
Frank Batten Jr. - Chairman of Landmark Media Enterprises, Virginia supporter
Guadalupe Sigman - Secretary/Treasurer Independent Auto Dealers Association District 4
Virginia, Fredericksburg supporter
Marlon Dance - Virginia Supporter
Bennie & Marcy W. Thomas, M.D. - Chesterfield supporters
Keith Jones - Chesterfield supporter
Wilson Spencer - Chesterfield supporter
Louis C. Smith - E. Alvin Small Funeral Home, Goochland supporter
Elizabeth S. Middleton - Goochland supporter
Kadita & Priscilla Tshibaka - Spotsylvania supporters ### _Tina Ramirez grew up in rural Powhatan County, Virginia. Tina has 20 years of experience as a public school teacher, foreign policy expert, and authority on international human rights law and religious freedom. Tina is the founder and President of Hardwired Global, an organization that defends religious freedom globally. Previously, Tina worked for the U.S. Commission on International Religious Freedom, Becket Law, and the U.S. Congress, where she founded the bi-partisan International Religious Freedom Caucus. Tina has traveled to over 30 countries in the course of her work and has written and spoken extensively, including before the United Nations and the African Union, and testified before the U.S. Congress. Tina and her 5-year-old daughter, Abigail, live in Chesterfield County._ **For Press Inquiries** –
**Contact** : _[Cindy@TinaRamirez.com](mailto:Cindy@TinaRamirez.com)_
**Phone** : 804-384-3674
---
---

The Ramirez Finance Committee includes : National leaders Gus Bilirakis - Current Florida Congressman (FL 12th district) Trent Franks - Former Arizona Congressman (AZ 2nd district) Doug & Jacki Deason - President of the Deason Foundation Bill Noble - Owner, William Noble Rare Jewels Orlando Salazar - Member of Latinos for Trump Loreen Gilbert - President, WealthWise Financial Services Ron Williams - Retired Secret Service, CEO of Talon Companies Tatiana Moon - President of Kirov Academy Deacon Keith Esshaki, Dr. Noori Barka, & Kamal Alsawaf - Members of Chaldean American Community Darrin Mroz - President of DJM Insurance Peter & Joy Bohlinger The Russo Family Steve & Deb Cleary Randal & Amy Clark Ashlee & Kelly Dunagan Tanveer Ahmed Guy & Patsy Young District Delegates William H. Hurd - Chesterfield Delegate, Former Solicitor General of Virginia Craig Stariha - Chesterfield Delegate, Retired Altria Executive Dr. James & Dodie Anderson - Chesterfield Delegates Jim & Merri Beth Gibson - Chesterfield delegates, Owner of Mypills2go.com Dr. Ben Howerton - Henrico Delegate, Chair of The First Freedom Council Mike Mickel - Henrico Delegate Pat & Catherine Hughes - Henrico Delegates Tommy Towers - Henrico delegate, Owner of James River Custom Homes Sidney Gunst - Powhatan Delegate Pete & Judy DeChat - Spotsylvania Delegates, Author & Philanthropist Dr. Rich Breeden (ABD) - Spotsylvania Delegate, Ceo Cyber Safari Inc. Local Supporters Frank Batten Jr. - Chairman of Landmark Media Enterprises, Virginia supporter Guadalupe Sigman - Secretary/Treasurer Independent Auto Dealers Association District 4 Virginia, Fredericksburg supporter Marlon Dance - Virginia Supporter Bennie & Marcy W. Thomas, M.D. - Chesterfield supporters Keith Jones - Chesterfield supporter Wilson Spencer - Chesterfield supporter Louis C. Smith - E. Alvin Small Funeral Home, Goochland supporter Elizabeth S. Middleton - Goochland supporter Kadita & Priscilla Tshibaka - Spotsylvania supporters ### Tina Ramirez grew up in rural Powhatan County, Virginia. Tina has 20 years of experience as a public school teacher, foreign policy expert, and authority on international human rights law and religious freedom. Tina is the founder and President of Hardwired Global, an organization that defends religious freedom globally. Previously, Tina worked for the U.S. Commission on International Religious Freedom, Becket Law, and the U.S. Congress, where she founded the bi-partisan International Religious Freedom Caucus. Tina has traveled to over 30 countries in the course of her work and has written and spoken extensively, including before the United Nations and the African Union, and testified before the U.S. Congress. Tina and her 5-year-old daughter, Abigail, live in Chesterfield County. For Press Inquiries – Contact : mailto:Cindy@TinaRamirez.com Phone : 804-384-3674 | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | |

name: Matt Mayberry
subject: election integrity (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Mayberry for Congress
body:
| | | Derek--

We just received some very disturbing news: outside, establishment groups are trying to distort our election process in New Hampshire.

When people asked me to run for Congress, I vowed to bring New Hampshire values to Washington - not the other way around. Now, The Swamp is trying to put its tentacles where they don't belong: in our election process.

The fact is that I'm the only candidate in this race who's actually from New Hampshire, who's voted in New Hampshire for President Trump, and the only one who knows New Hampshire. These outside groups want you to overlook that.

If you believe in New Hampshire values as much as I do, I need you to take a step forward and help our campaign build up our Voter Integrity Fund to make sure that we have a fair election in the upcoming primary. Can you chip in $25 today and help us fight back?

**[Secure contribution link: Voter Integrity Fund](http://click.cmidigital.us/?qs=7d147977b3135b18ba0adb12522a6d86fae2cafb0965202d204778353a8979e425d8e11bbda92ac97d6731044322fc6fd87db986a87c16b3 "Secure contribution link: Voter Integrity Fund")**

Our New Hampshire values are at stake. Please do what you can today!

-Matt Mayberry

* * *
---
Dear Friend, I've picked up three key endorsements in the last week:
* Indivisible TX-17 Bryan-College Station
* Liberal Austin Democrats
* Wells Branch Democrats

These are in addition to prior endorsements from:
* The Austin American Statesman
* The Austin Chronicle
* Texas AFL-CIO
* Central Texas Labor Council - AFL-CIO
* Pflugerville Area Democrats
* Young Dems BCS
* North by Northwest Democrats
* University Democrats

I am both proud, and humbled, by the breadth and depth of support these endorsements represent. In other news, we've launched our digital ad campaign and it's showing some excellent early results. Analysis shows we're reaching people we'd have difficulty reaching otherwise - especially during the COVID-19 pandemic. And of course - fundraising is picking up dramatically as we can now demonstrate a credible path to victory. June has already been our best fundraising month ever, but we have to drive to the finish line to make this our best quarter ever. clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running for the open seat in the 17th District.= Dear Friend, I've picked up three key endorsements in the last week: Indivisible TX-17 Bryan-College Station Liberal Austin Democrats Wells Branch Democrats These are in addition to prior endorsements from: The Austin American Statesman The Austin Chronicle Texas AFL-CIO Central Texas Labor Council - AFL-CIO Pflugerville Area Democrats Young Dems BCS North by Northwest Democrats University Democrats I am both proud, and humbled, by the breadth and depth of support these endorsements represent. In other news, we've launched our digital ad campaign and it's showing some excellent early results. Analysis shows we're reaching people we'd have difficulty reaching otherwise - especially during the COVID-19 pandemic. And of course - fundraising is picking up dramatically as we can now demonstrate a credible path to victory. June has already been our best fundraising month ever, but we have to drive to the finish line to make this our best quarter ever. As well as things are going, I still very much need your support. =. name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Martin Luther King, III will be there
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress |
body:
Please join

Congressman Al Green

For a virtual discussion with
Martin Luther King, III

Wednesday, June 24 2020
4:00 to 5:00PM Central

This event is the first of a three-part series on race relations and criminal justice reform in the United States. The funds raised at these events will be used for the 2020 General Election.

Contribution Levels:
Patron $1,500 Host $1,000 Sponsor $500 Friend $100

Attend all three events for $2,800

Video call details will be provided to all confirmed guests prior to the event.
To RSVP please follow this link:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/agreenjune24

RSVP 713-942-5800 or rsvp@strongstrategies.com

Checks may be made payable to:
Keep Al Green in Congress
and mailed to P.O. Box 56761, Houston, TX 77256-6761

If you received this message in error or wish to stop receiving email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/eburFYzqZv0-aLqcN_W8Z4KvXRRQXh-PVenU7uIKWv8=/6UKbMvg7f5uI0yF_6CnpxngunnDRabw1DqMNuPA7cJo=.

| Join us Saturday June 27th at 10am at an undisclosed location in Eastern Rockingham County for a great Explore NH event! Join Matt Mayberry and let him show you one of the prettiest spots in all of New Hampshire. He has been to all 239 towns and cities in NH so he knows his way around! Sign up below and you will be given the location of the site to meet. We all get together and walk about one mile into the location. This is one that only the super locals know about so you know it will be good! [RSVP / More Information Here](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ2MzI1NTAwMDc0MDA1NzAyJmM9ejBqNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjAwMTQ2MjAmZD1mMnc4czRz.QgSh_rvI64h7ouegLqTqhzmuHH9e4HzboOViLE-OrJw) Kids and dogs and bikes and all your friends are welcome to join us!! The trail is level and packed gravel. You will be walking about one mile one way so wear comfortable shoes. Snacks and refreshments will be at the location. Bring your cameras, its really pretty out there. Rain date will be Sunday June 28 at 10am.

name: Betsy R
subject: Gun Sense Forum with Moms Demand Action- TONIGHT at 7 pm!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
|
---
_**Join us on Zoom TONIGHT at 7 pm for**_ _**a Gun Sense Townhall with Moms Demand Action**_ Hi Peter, While Ohio is facing mass unemployment and a strain on its social services, our state legislature has prioritized several bills focused on loosening gun restrictions with legislation such as [HB 425](https://act.myngp.com/el/Rwr74kwrEgYLJeQ7g4tYnL1lC-KKNonsJVBcAeVbOmo=/y3ilJ1wKkC2A98y0wIrldEn8N4lYdGQfiQujE05Ryj8=?id=GA133-HB-425) which would eliminate the duty of an individual to "promptly notify" an officer of a concealed firearm and [HB 381](https://act.myngp.com/el/Rwr74kwrEgYLJeQ7g4tYnL1lC-KKNonsJVBcAeVbOmo=/y3ilJ1wKkC2A98y0wIrldEn8N4lYdGQfiQujE05Ryj8=?id=GA133-HB-381) which would enact a "Stand Your Ground" law in Ohio. In a time where a global pandemic is contributing to increased gun sales, and exacerbating domestic violence, our state government should focus on protecting its people, not endangering more lives. I'm no stranger to guns or to the critical importance of gun safety. My dad was a game warden. We spent the weekends hunting and fishing, and guns were a constant presence. I respect the Second Amendment but I also will continue to fight for common sense measures, like background checks and red flag laws, which keep our communities and our children safe. Please join me and Maureen Washock from Moms Demand Action via Zoom to discuss gun safety during COVID-19, SMART storage of firearms, and the impact of extremist gun legislation on racial injustice. **Join us and spread the word about our Gun Sense Townhall with Betsy Rader and Maureen Washock. [Click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/Rwr74kwrEgYLJeQ7g4tYnL1lC-KKNonsJVBcAeVbOmo=/r08PSdYTkPslpqlvRV_9YIgs5rKUiKbavTIo9rDCwzQ=) to register for the Zoom forum TONIGHT at 7 pm or use the link below. ** [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZcpf-GvrTwuHNbSwClea0FrbfjtTdMko0VQ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Rwr74kwrEgYLJeQ7g4tYnL1lC-KKNonsJVBcAeVbOmo=/r08PSdYTkPslpqlvRV_9YIgs5rKUiKbavTIo9rDCwzQ=) Forward this email to your friends so we can grow the conversation. We look forward to seeing you online and helping to promote gun sense in Ohio.
---
Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
---
Friends of Betsy Rader
PO Box 280
Novelty OH 44072 United States
[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Rwr74kwrEgYLJeQ7g4tYnL1lC-KKNonsJVBcAeVbOmo=/hv28zHHohLu51gXxZoarZmNx-zHoRkTaAbHisWNb0zQ=)

We look forward to seeing you online and helping to promote gun sense in Ohio. Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader Friends of Betsy Rader PO Box 280 Novelty OH 44072 United States =

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Exciting news at a perfect time
body:
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you heard the exciting news from last week, which comes at a perfect time.
As My Faith Votes gears up to recruit and mobilize Christian voters for 2020, Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.) has come on board as our newest national spokesman.
Our efforts will be aided tremendously by his courage and clarity. At this time in our history, our faith requires a renewed commitment and boldness, and Allen is the perfect example. Will you join Allen and me in boldly advancing the mission of My Faith Votes? Please consider making a **[tax-deductible donation now](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200618apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200618apl01nd&n=1)**.
Lt. Col. West joining our team is welcome news because the latest decision from the U.S. Supreme Court, _Bostock vs. Clayton County_ , shows us that we’ve still got plenty of work to do.
In what’s being hailed as a landmark victory for LGBTQ rights, the majority basically went around Congress and redefined “sex” to mean “sexual orientation” and “gender identity.” The fact that this opinion was written by Justice Gorsuch was especially disappointing.
In his dissent, Justice Alito warned the decision was a threat to religious liberty -- particularly in regards to certain employers and healthcare providers who may now be penalized for refusing to pay for such things as sex reassignment procedures.
While those of us who believe in biblical values have notched some important wins, this decision shows that we still have a ton of work to do.
We simply cannot just place our hopes in the courts. We must compete to win and turn out voters for elections at every level.
Every single U.S. House member is up for reelection along with one-third of our U.S. Senators. 11 governorships are up for grabs and legislatures in 44 states will be holding elections too. In other words, we’ve got our work cut out for us.
**Each week, My Faith Votes makes more and more progress, and your continued financial support would be extremely helpful. Every little bit counts.**
Thank you for everything, and God bless this country. Things are undoubtedly tough right now, but I have faith in you and all of our fellow citizens.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200618apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200618apl01nd&n=2)
Sincerely,
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200618apl01nd&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200618apl01nd&n=4).

name: Allen Chen
subject: POLITICO: NRCC spending 2 million in Houston
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17920795/210986499/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.18_AC_b1_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2EyM2E3Yy04Y2IxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=26Gvh9Gdfok2WVElPw0ZK7EkYZkJTgBT_zmkzJYZX-s=)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17920796/210986500/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2EyM2E3Yy04Y2IxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=26Gvh9Gdfok2WVElPw0ZK7EkYZkJTgBT_zmkzJYZX-s=&emci=81987770-80b1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=e3a23a7c-8cb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Friend --

The National Republican Congressional Committee just announced a 2.1 million dollar television buy in Houston, **and we need your immediate support.**

[**As one of our most dedicated supporters in this fight, can you pitch in now to help us take a stand against the Washington Republican establishment?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17920797/210986501/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.18_AC_b1_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2EyM2E3Yy04Y2IxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=26Gvh9Gdfok2WVElPw0ZK7EkYZkJTgBT_zmkzJYZX-s=) | [Donate to Sri's Media Fund ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17920798/210986502/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.18_AC_b1_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2EyM2E3Yy04Y2IxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=26Gvh9Gdfok2WVElPw0ZK7EkYZkJTgBT_zmkzJYZX-s=)
---

Washington Republicans see Houston as the key to taking back the House majority, so they’re preparing to drop millions in television advertising to ensure our congressional districts go red in November.

If we’re going to compete (_and win!_) we’ll need the resources to fight back immediately, friend.

If we can reach every voter in our district with Sri’s story of public service and mission to keep special interests out of Houston — we **_will_** flip this district blue. But that starts with getting Sri’s message out into the community as soon as possible.

Remember: Sri isn’t accepting a cent of corporate PAC money. Our success this fall lies entirely in the hands of our grassroots supporters like you, friend. [**Can I count on you to rush a $20 donation immediately to help our campaign reserve airtime and run our campaign ads to families in TX-22?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17920799/210986503/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.18_AC_b1_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2EyM2E3Yy04Y2IxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=26Gvh9Gdfok2WVElPw0ZK7EkYZkJTgBT_zmkzJYZX-s=) [Fuel our media fund ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17920800/210986504/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.18_AC_b1_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2EyM2E3Yy04Y2IxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=26Gvh9Gdfok2WVElPw0ZK7EkYZkJTgBT_zmkzJYZX-s=)
---

Thank you for stepping up,
Allen
\--

clean_body: = | Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Friend -- The National Republican Congressional Committee just announced a 2.1 million dollar television buy in Houston, and we need your immediate support. = | = Washington Republicans see Houston as the key to taking back the House majority, so they’re preparing to drop millions in television advertising to ensure our congressional districts go red in November. If we’re going to compete (and win!) we’ll need the resources to fight back immediately, friend. name: PETITION [Black Democrats]
subject: Don't wait: demand Juneteenth be a federal holiday!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by the Congressional Black Caucus PAC
body:
150,000 E-SIGNATURES NEEDED: |
---
| | | [](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7a/693e3cfe/4d670e4a/3a041917/4171564961/VEsH/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Juneteenth-National-Holiday?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.18_B1_Juneteenth-National-Holiday_X__F1_S1_C1__all_RS")
---
[150,000 E-SIGNATURES NEEDED TO DEMAND CONGRESS **MAKE JUNETEENTH A FEDERAL HOLIDAY:** SIGN ON NOW ->](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7a/693e3cfe/4d670e4a/3a041917/4171564961/VEsE/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Juneteenth-National-Holiday?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.18_B1_Juneteenth-National-Holiday_X__F1_S1_C1__all_RS") | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW ➞](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7a/693e3cfe/4d670e4a/3a041917/4171564961/VEsF/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Juneteenth-National-Holiday?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.18_B1_Juneteenth-National-Holiday_X__F1_S1_C1__all_RS")
---
Juneteenth is a historic day for emancipation and Black history in America.

It deserves to be a federal holiday.

If we can show that enough people support this initiative, Congress will have no choice but to enact Juneteenth as a federal holiday.

_But we only have until tomorrow night until our petition is due!!_

So we're scrambling to collect 150,000 e-signatures to demand Congress make Juneteenth a federal holiday.
[Sign on now >>](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7a/693e3cfe/4d670e4a/3a041917/4171564961/VEsC/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Juneteenth-National-Holiday?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.18_B1_Juneteenth-National-Holiday_X__F1_S1_C1__all_RS")
[SIGN MY NAME TO DEMAND JUNETEENTH BE A FEDERAL HOLIDAY ➞](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7a/693e3cfe/4d670e4a/3a041917/4171564961/VEsD/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/Juneteenth-National-Holiday?source=MS_EM_PET_2020.06.18_B1_Juneteenth-National-Holiday_X__F1_S1_C1__all_RS")
---
Thanks so much,

_Congressional Black Caucus PAC_

| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ Click here to receive fewer emails.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7a/693e3cfe/4d670e4a/3a041916/4171564961/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7a/693e3cfe/4d670e4a/3a041911/4171564961/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://go.cbcpac.org/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

455 Massachusetts Ave., NW #150-355
Washington DC 20001

The Congressional Black Caucus works to increase the number of African Americans in the U.S. Congress, support non-Black candidates that champion our interests, and promote African American participation in the political process.

We're committed to getting African Americans and non-Black allies elected to the highest positions in Congress and activated at the polls to advance issues that matter in our communities.

By joining this grassroots movement, you are helping uplift African Americans in the political process. Our campaign is powered by supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to combating the Trump Administration and promoting African American participation in the political process. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, [please click here.](https://go.cbcpac.org/page/m/1f32bc7a/693e3cfe/4d670e4a/3a041913/4171564961/VEsP/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_cbc_footer?refcode=MS_EM_FR_2019.02.26_X_Footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Jim Inhofe
subject: The Green New Deal threatens our recovery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jim Inhofe](https://click
body:
| |
---
Right now, our country is hurting from the economic impact of the coronavirus. More than 20 million Americans have lost their jobs, including tens of thousands in Oklahoma. I’m confident we’ll turn it around—just look at last month’s jobs report—but make no mistake: coronavirus has hurt our economy. | [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ2MzgxODc3Njc3MDA0NTA4JmM9cDZrNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjAwNTUwMDImZD1wMmIzczlr.fCY71VQF0tlee05OqAPspHuG1Irv0X4f9Abtk8XqXI4)
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ2MzgxODc3Njc3MDA0NTA4JmM9cDZrNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjAwNTUwMDQmZD1wMWcxbTRl.f729Zd36BtecY9eBMM3XaUDDBiZcfBElv-lpgwW0YMo)
---
---
| |
---
| Hi , While families are feeling the impact of the coronavirus lockdowns on the economy, Americans haven't given up hope. The latest unemployment numbers show millions of people are already going back to work, and that will continue to increase as more and more states lift their restrictions. When we reopen, our economy will be stronger than ever before. President Trump helped create the greatest American economy in my lifetime, and I am ready to help him do it again. Our recovery won't be possible if liberal Democrats get their way and force climate change legislation down our throats. In the midst of our recovery they're still talking about the Green New Deal!
_**[I need your help to stop this disastrous legislation dead in its tracks. Support my fight to kill the Green New Deal right now with a quick donation of $30 or more.](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ2MzgxODc3Njc3MDA0NTA4JmM9cDZrNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjAwNTUwMDYmZD1yNnkyaTlo.WmEIOwfcIOpvLXlJJxd1WG0X4SkFk-Q2CjDjtP4OjL8)**_
---
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ2MzgxODc3Njc3MDA0NTA4JmM9cDZrNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjAwNTUwMDgmZD1qNWMxbzhi.IGZGwd44VlI1dUf_6xR6uzNtcVyVEUSHMMoGI0w20dE)
---
---
| |
---
| Over the past three years, the Trump Administration has pursued a successful policy of deregulation. House and Senate Republicans have helped by passing legislation that eliminates burdensome laws and regulations to free the American economy. The Tax Cuts & Jobs Act also helped by allowing taxpayers to keep more of their hard-earned money, and allowing corporations to invest in American workers. **The Green New Deal will do the opposite.** In addition to imposing outrageous new climate change regulations, it proposes eliminating all air travel, ending our use of oil and gas, and banning cattle farming across the United States. It would cost $93 trillion dollars over the next decade--an increase of more than $75,000 in annual costs per household! In other words, Democrats want to simultaneously increase travel costs, electricity costs, and food costs for every single American.
[**I am working hard to make sure the Green New Deal never becomes law, but I need to know that you are behind me. Show me you have my back with a one time donation of $45 right now.**](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ2MzgxODc3Njc3MDA0NTA4JmM9cDZrNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjAwNTUwMTAmZD1kNHMxZzNv.argImMQKqIO-GllKlON7w1vqnqtyMwzD2OUoGJClzMk) I will always support hardworking American families, and do everything in my power to make their lives better. Right now, that means defeating the Green New Deal. It is the single most destructive piece of legislation that I've seen since Obamacare and threatens to harm an even larger portion of our economy. I won't let that happen as long as I'm in the Senate. Stand with me today and together we can ensure the Green New Deal never becomes law.

---
---
| |
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQ2MzgxODc3Njc3MDA0NTA4JmM9cDZrNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjAwNTUwMTQmZD1hOGg3ZjRr.aF9vVl-e5OkIeaxsKC9dngSElq9B3MouFZj92Ul_sfw)
---
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Thank you and God Bless,
---
| Jim Inhofe

subject: We thought this would happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Now that polls show Mondaire in the lead, our opponents are getting desperate. In fact, one of them, the son of a pharmaceutical billionaire, just dumped an additional $450,000 into the race. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UpiXIbuiKE2eLVmWt9VP0LBX52ATTBZNiKBtwbRRxgDUEwktfzbox7LUYDMnMVfr4C8LJG_d0MkSOu3mnArkhGIPxT1ohr2Uf6FYAKqgQprvs5QHxMxbiWqa-gQnREXyF8c-N8twiNj-QcTg_Ak90tuKW23IGxtkBOBtogGr_lNF0ptRqsEdPLAUZQpTOlv_NtFxvfQ125pVbxde9m7ADCuhWVWfjRAg1cy40R4AGfdQG6-pdMScTH0RTwySUTvU0-Tf0ldTPJAfMyfDanxzxXADxQkoFsH0ZtxZLh5yG5ww/32q/G6czMmuCT5qfl2naGEShSg/h0/2o8gkI8YdxIZE3jo26sMBQrL3NNY1U3BIxB6ZXN56o4) Friend,
Now that polls show Mondaire in the lead, our opponents are getting desperate. In fact, one of them, the son of a pharmaceutical billionaire, just dumped an additional $450,000 into the race.
In these final days of the election, **_he is trying to drown out our message by spending hundreds of thousands of dollars in Big Pharma money that he inherited_**. We can’t let this happen.
On Sunday, I told you we had a goal of raising $150,000 this week. If we want to stay competitive, we need to up that goal to $200,000. That means we still need to raise $57,867 by Saturday. **_[Will you make a contribution now to make sure our message doesn’t get drowned out?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UpiXIbuiKE2eLVmWt9VP0LHbby68h8vcJgLYicy3EQ4QLqLkReCz6tw7lTqb2h_WtTHd-qOvxP7KfuEdUoPpyCNVEZJpvL3ctBCLFD1rSH-Kf0AoC9mypqW81Ai3cRb3Y1ofFlkCNgmnmj514LQ0TzRLyiGqTRaC9FiQrwmAJ5DHwlnm5lPAZJ-pKUY-PPlOAJ7iqGztTGBtHh3lTatOafjA-0NCKSC-TpZvumsb2AFcN1lLlixkv7FtVEV43a-n04P5ekyPaeMQnVH4aDg8raighStGEC0Zg6Ki3oqL-dvQ/32q/G6czMmuCT5qfl2naGEShSg/h1/JhSDXeDBZ9cbQaLxGuGFGpziMgJBAUsLpfRWcjUmKAQ)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UpiXIbuiKE2eLVmWt9VP0LGRtFa175c6hdF3LzwOftAynXEuqMdg2t4W1TDbM8XcpMyubAwookkZUEFfV7ijxIHcNL359GgELwjs44WbUtXpu5qCYc4spyqrww0UeAn4Q37n-q1dPc5BwhYeI0g4E7QbySt4C1nCtzpbGuxgx-ErEAn4HdBzgofSQTVp4L0IUx8tJeOcQ1JXBUhBMLk6QMO98FSYiDsPMFdi1zm_7c5HDYXMsBnWIoOaTiKa5tdAUMzeotRzK5hcUjGMC02VXSxR-7MycbDx4u3tuxz_lvQ0/32q/G6czMmuCT5qfl2naGEShSg/h2/zn3PuiEwlEZ9VM3P8vKL_JdvlZp7eETr4DCWhHo-Ov8)
We might not be able to self-fund our campaign with millions of dollars, but we do have a movement of grassroots supporters **_that has made over 22,000 individual donations to our campaign_**.

Dear Peter ,
You're invited! Join us Tuesday, June 30th 5:30CT for a roundtable discussion with TNDP Chair Mary Mancini, Tricia Herzfeld, Reyna Walters-Morgan, and Kendra Lee. All tickets and sponsorships will go directly toward TNDP's 2020 Voter Protection Program. The vote is more important in 2020 than ever before. As our nation is in crisis, Republicans are deploying tactics to keep people from voting. We must protect the vote.
Tickets are $25.00 and sponsorship opportunities are available.
Sponsorships start at $100 & up. Tickets are $25.00. Register now! [https://tndp.org/protect-vote-fundraiser/]

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: If you open one email from us, make it this one
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/WESnrK7fpGI9L_YJrfVRcffQQjbpLiOva_5vhi2Bp98=/bWwvgHg6nJJjxzLND5j4WSmTTtjAJCjWBFbQyMO73dI=)

Peter,

No, this isn't the last time you'll be hearing from me or our team. But if there's one email that I hope you'll read from us before Tuesday's primary election, it's this one.

This campaign started out with a simple message: Brooklyn deserves better. And now, we're just days away from proving that better is possible. Better housing, better healthcare, and a better future for everyone who calls our community home -- **that 's what's on the line this Tuesday, and that's why I'm asking for your help today so we can go out and Win. This. Election.**

This is our final fundraising push before Primary Day, so every single dollar counts more than ever. **[Whether you've been with us since the beginning or just recently joined our team, I'm asking you right now: Will you chip in whatever you can today so we can put out one final call to voters and get them to the polls?](https://act.myngp.com/el/WESnrK7fpGI9L_YJrfVRcffQQjbpLiOva_5vhi2Bp98=/gM4BaKguvhFS2r5azpaYCz08PNyCccGKWtANgZI6W18=)**

******[YOUR DONATION HELPS US WIN!](https://act.myngp.com/el/WESnrK7fpGI9L_YJrfVRcffQQjbpLiOva_5vhi2Bp98=/gM4BaKguvhFS2r5azpaYCz08PNyCccGKWtANgZI6W18=)******

I'm not going to sugarcoat it: This is going to be a close, competitive, and hard-fought race that will come down to every last vote. But that's all the more reason why I'm counting on your support today. **[_Your_ donation will help us make that call, send that text, or fund that ad to put us over the edge -- and if everyone reading this right now gave what they could, we'd be well on our way to reaching every voter in Brooklyn.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WESnrK7fpGI9L_YJrfVRcffQQjbpLiOva_5vhi2Bp98=/gM4BaKguvhFS2r5azpaYCz08PNyCccGKWtANgZI6W18=)**

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/WESnrK7fpGI9L_YJrfVRcffQQjbpLiOva_5vhi2Bp98=/gM4BaKguvhFS2r5azpaYCz08PNyCccGKWtANgZI6W18=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250)******
******[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/WESnrK7fpGI9L_YJrfVRcffQQjbpLiOva_5vhi2Bp98=/gM4BaKguvhFS2r5azpaYCz08PNyCccGKWtANgZI6W18=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100)******
******[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/WESnrK7fpGI9L_YJrfVRcffQQjbpLiOva_5vhi2Bp98=/gM4BaKguvhFS2r5azpaYCz08PNyCccGKWtANgZI6W18=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50)******
******[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/WESnrK7fpGI9L_YJrfVRcffQQjbpLiOva_5vhi2Bp98=/gM4BaKguvhFS2r5azpaYCz08PNyCccGKWtANgZI6W18=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other)******

This could be the deciding moment of the election, Peter.

Will you look back on this race knowing you did everything you could to help us win?

Best,
Adem
******[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/WESnrK7fpGI9L_YJrfVRcffQQjbpLiOva_5vhi2Bp98=/gM4BaKguvhFS2r5azpaYCz08PNyCccGKWtANgZI6W18=)******

* * *

| | Look, Peter, we've been having some fun with Sen. Cornyn's retirement the last couple days, but **we 're completely serious about the damage that he's done to this country.**

From his xenophobic, bigoted posts on Twitter, to his efforts to repeal the Affordable Care Act, to the partisan judges he's championed, to his refusal to support meaningful gun safety legislation or immigration reform, Sen. Cornyn has not represented Texas. **[DONATE FOR A SENATOR TO REPRESENT TEXAS](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901a7/7f51f7bc/4e962146/4ef6d491/3132363944/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200618.1nd__1565__&amount=10")** While **corporate PACs, the Koch network, Big Pharma, and the NRA** are spending millions to keep him in office, it's clear that **everyday Texans don 't want him there**. With only a **37% approval rating**, it's time for Sen. Cornyn to retire.

I will fight for **workers ' rights**, for **criminal justice reform** , for **expanded access to health care** , for **a safer world for our kids** , and most importantly, **I 'll fight for you**. It's high time we elect a fighter to represent Texas in the U.S. Senate, and we've got a Texas-sized grassroots team ready to retire Sen. Cornyn.

name: Team Good
subject: The right side of history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17923001/211024846/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJhMTM4Ny05YWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpxDqIMFKn-FZLVCm5JOYgWwj1GAWVNPFhl-MKXFr7w=&emci=b975c79c-7bb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=aaba1387-9ab1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) Team,

This week we saw a historic decision from the Supreme Court that determined people cannot be fired for their gender identity or sexual orientation — a landmark in the continued journey for equality and something we all here at #TeamGood are celebrating! But make no mistake, the fight continues every day.

Our Suncoast community is home to thousands of LGBTQ+ constituents, and while this week brought a huge and historic victory in the Supreme Court, just days before on the anniversary of the Pulse Nightclub shooting, the Trump administration rolled back health care protections for the transgender community.

But it’s not just the Trump administration that turns its back on LGBTQ+ Americans.

Vern Buchanan has stood with Trump and voted time and again against protecting LGBTQ+ Americans. He voted against the bipartisan Equality Act, which would prohibit discrimination against LGBTQ+ people and would have prevented the Trump Administration from rolling back healthcare protections for transgender Americans.

**[If you’ve had enough of Vern Buchanan, stand with Margaret Good. If you believe that LGBTQ+ Floridians deserve a representative who won't fall silent in the face of the bigotry and who will stand up for their rights, now is the time to take action.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17923002/211024847/401617078?contactdata=d0vl6HRB2SulBafHfOEqBLn7HfeeCS5vQESIMg2xAAOHuxNUcCVRMC%2FAkK16oXHp6lCPzqkVgQX5YsP53QC8xlWg6ZsGRd%2FJWr1S%2B5Nx69r0XkDqZZ5OWt6mDKzYzyNMKT8rAjKtjdzMndxEixNs%2BQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJhMTM4Ny05YWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpxDqIMFKn-FZLVCm5JOYgWwj1GAWVNPFhl-MKXFr7w=&emci=b975c79c-7bb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=aaba1387-9ab1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

Buchanan voted time and again against the bipartisan Matthew Shepard and James Byrd Jr. Hate Crimes Prevention Act, which expands federal hate crime protections to LGBTQ+ individuals and makes it easier for the federal government to prosecute hate crimes based on race, religion, or national origin.

Vern Buchanan has turned his back on the LGBTQ+ community. He refuses to protect our friends, family, and neighbors from discrimination and hate.

**[If you know it is time for change, add your name to the thousands of reasonable people who are calling for Vern’s retirement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17923003/211024848/401617078?contactdata=d0vl6HRB2SulBafHfOEqBLn7HfeeCS5vQESIMg2xAAOHuxNUcCVRMC%2FAkK16oXHp6lCPzqkVgQX5YsP53QC8xlWg6ZsGRd%2FJWr1S%2B5Nx69r0XkDqZZ5OWt6mDKzYzyNMKT8rAjKtjdzMndxEixNs%2BQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJhMTM4Ny05YWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpxDqIMFKn-FZLVCm5JOYgWwj1GAWVNPFhl-MKXFr7w=&emci=b975c79c-7bb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=aaba1387-9ab1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

This is our time.

The staff, volunteers, and supporters of Margaret Good for Congress | [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17923004/211024849/1073285021?refcode=em06182020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJhMTM4Ny05YWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpxDqIMFKn-FZLVCm5JOYgWwj1GAWVNPFhl-MKXFr7w=)
---

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17923005/211024850/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJhMTM4Ny05YWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpxDqIMFKn-FZLVCm5JOYgWwj1GAWVNPFhl-MKXFr7w=)**

If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17923006/211024851/192916899?contactdata=d0vl6HRB2SulBafHfOEqBLn7HfeeCS5vQESIMg2xAAOHuxNUcCVRMC%2FAkK16oXHp6lCPzqkVgQX5YsP53QC8xlWg6ZsGRd%2FJWr1S%2B5Nx69r0XkDqZZ5OWt6mDKzYzyNMKT8rAjKtjdzMndxEixNs%2BQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJhMTM4Ny05YWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpxDqIMFKn-FZLVCm5JOYgWwj1GAWVNPFhl-MKXFr7w=&emci=b975c79c-7bb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=aaba1387-9ab1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b975c79c-7bb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74/aaba1387-9ab1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWJhMTM4Ny05YWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpxDqIMFKn-FZLVCm5JOYgWwj1GAWVNPFhl-MKXFr7w=&id=113801977) .

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Under Donald Trump’s Leadership, the US Economy Will Come Back Strong
body:
While we focus on improving the economic growth of our nation, all Americans will be able to enjoy the economic benefits of which the U.S. is capable. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=683660885f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# Under Donald Trump’s Leadership, the US Economy Will Come Back Strong

“As the economy gets back to where it was, with record low unemployment for African Americans, Hispanics, women and the disabled, and with more rapid increases in non-supervisory pay, Americans deserve to be hopeful and eager to get back to their pre-pandemic routines,” Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross writes in _The Kansas City Star_.

“While we focus on improving the economic growth of our nation, all Americans from coast to coast will be able to enjoy the economic benefits of which the United States of America is capable.”

[Click here to read more](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7cc8f01fc6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “NBC News attempted this week to use the power of Google to cancel our publication, the Federalist,” Ben Domenech and Sean Davis write. “The effort failed, but it should serve as a warning about the unchecked power of big tech companies, particularly when they can be manipulated by partisans.” Read more in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb2c618772&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---

The most critical deadline of my race to date is only **6 days away.** June 24th marks my pre-primary deadline -- my campaign's final shot at reaching our fundraising goals before the primary election. And today, **we are BEHIND and we are being OUTRAISED.**
That is why I must ask you this: [**Can I count on you to chip in just $5, $10, or $25 to my campaign today? Any amount makes a huge difference in our effort to catch up to my opponent 's massive fundraising numbers. Your support today can change this race.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3NjAwMTgS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTYyNDMyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Friend,
Fundraising numbers for June aren’t where they need to be, and we need your help. To be on track for covering expenses for programs like our Adopt a Voter program, we should have raised $6,000 already this month. We’ve raised $4,680. We’re asking for your help.

Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP

name: Catherine Englebrecht
subject: Will YOUR vote end up in the trash?
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=59A91A14A445)
---
| | Friend,

I just read an incredible report published in the _New Jersey Globe_. It should be shocking... but it’s an outcome that was all too predictable.

The story features a garbage bag stuffed with undelivered mail.

It tells us of thousands of uncounted ballots – which took up to 21 days for the post office to deliver – and multiple races now in court amidst allegations of voter fraud.

It details a state and federal investigation that has been launched, after nearly 900 ballots appear to have been harvested and mailed from just three mailboxes.

This is all in just one city, Paterson, New Jersey.

**Is this what we can expect all across America on November 3rd?**

It’s clearly what the leftists want. They LOVE chaos. They want to win, at any cost, legitimate or illegitimate.

Their push to force us to vote-by-mail is a direct assault against the integrity of our elections and YOUR right to vote!

_Do you want to cast your 2020 ballot knowing that your vote could end up in the trash?_

This is what we’re fighting against. It’s why we’re suing states that are seeking to force these schemes on voters. And we can’t let up.

Help sustain our fight. We’re locked in a battle for our nation’s future that we never could have anticipated just a few short months again. EVERY contribution is a huge help.

**_[Rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution today, to support our work at True the Vote to PROTECT our elections.](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=59A91A14A445)_**

Onward!

Catherine Engelbrecht
True the Vote

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Drain the Swamp!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/drain-the-swamp?e=41f8e27552)
---
| | Peter

Washington keeps trying to tell Kansans who they want to be our next senator and trying to make Democrat Barbara Bollier happen. **It's not going happen on my watch.** Washington insiders who live in a bubble, who do not talk to actual Kansans and believe fake polls are the ones telling Kansans who to vote for. Don't be fooled. What’s more frightening is the DC crowd really believes that they can get whatever they want. No wonder President Trump wants to drain the swamp! I am running for the U.S. Senate because I want to work with President Trump to drain the swamp and deliver for We The People. Washington insiders for far too long have ignored Kansans. We cannot stand by and let them dictate who is our next senator. We know a conservative can win this year’s U.S. Senate race here in Kansas and we know that far left Democrat Barbara Bollier would be devastating. I have been across our great state and know what people in Great Bend, Colby, Medicine Lodge, Lindsborg, Lucas, Fort Scott, Baldwin City and Westwood are talking about. **The people of Kansas want lower taxes, they support our law enforcement, and they want a voice for agriculture in the Senate.** Join me in my campaign for the U.S. Senate and help me deliver for the people of Kansas by **draining the swamp!** Dave _P.S.: Please help me get our message out to all Kansans by clicking on the logo below to donate._ [](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=e23d8c625b&e=41f8e27552)

clean_body: | | | | | Peter Washington keeps trying to tell Kansans who they want to be our next senator and trying to make Democrat Barbara Bollier happen. It's not going happen on my watch. Washington insiders who live in a bubble, who do not talk to actual Kansans and believe fake polls are the ones telling Kansans who to vote for. Don't be fooled. What’s more frightening is the DC crowd really believes that they can get whatever they want. No wonder President Trump wants to drain the swamp! I am running for the U.S. Senate because I want to work with President Trump to drain the swamp and deliver for We The People. Washington insiders for far too long have ignored Kansans. We cannot stand by and let them dictate who is our next senator. We know a conservative can win this year’s U.S. Senate race here in Kansas and we know that far left Democrat Barbara Bollier would be devastating. I have been across our great state and know what people in Great Bend, Colby, Medicine Lodge, Lindsborg, Lucas, Fort Scott, Baldwin City and Westwood are talking about. The people of Kansas want lower taxes, they support our law enforcement, and they want a voice for agriculture in the Senate. Join me in my campaign for the U.S. Senate and help me deliver for the people of Kansas by draining the swamp! Dave P.S.: Please help me get our message out to all Kansans by clicking on the logo below to donate. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Lindstrom for Senate, All rights reserved.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by People First Future
body:
He's the best candidate to take on Mitch McConnell
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17924685/211061559/-1445340428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEzYTFkOC1hOGIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4liHto0w3ZUhdrwOPC87ERenaSs78hwfimr4UkE2nAc=&emci=0afbb0fd-9fb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=2aa3a1d8-a8b1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=1262380)
**Team, do you want to beat Mitch McConnell?**
Today, I'm proud to endorse **Charles Booker,** who is running for Senate in Kentucky to take on McConnell. **[His primary is on Tuesday, which means he needs our support today. Will you split a gift between Charles Booker and People First Future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17924686/211061560/622717348?refcode=em20200618-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEzYTFkOC1hOGIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4liHto0w3ZUhdrwOPC87ERenaSs78hwfimr4UkE2nAc=)**
Charles is the best candidate to take on Mitch McConnell — and beating McConnell will be a big step toward building a people first future.
In fact, just today, the Supreme Court struck down the Trump administration's attempt to end DACA. While that's great news, it's only a temporary reprieve. **We need a permanent solution to DACA — but we won't get one with Mitch McConnell in the Senate.**
**[I'll tell you a bit more about Charles in a second — but first, can you split a donation between Charles Booker and People First Future today? With his primary on Tuesday, Charles needs our help now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17924700/211061574/622717348?refcode=em20200618-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEzYTFkOC1hOGIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4liHto0w3ZUhdrwOPC87ERenaSs78hwfimr4UkE2nAc=)**
[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17924701/211061575/622717348?refcode=em20200618-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEzYTFkOC1hOGIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4liHto0w3ZUhdrwOPC87ERenaSs78hwfimr4UkE2nAc=)
**Charles Booker is a true people first candidate.** He's lived the struggle that other politicians just talk about. A lifelong Kentuckian, he was born and raised in the west end of Louisville, in one of the poorest ZIP codes in the state. Even with food stamps and free lunch, Charles still sometimes went hungry. After Charles was diagnosed with diabetes, **his family had to ration his insulin to survive.**
For the last decade, Charles has been fighting for Kentuckians, working at every level of government **for the people.**
In 2018, he was elected to the Kentucky State House of Representatives, becoming the youngest black state legislator in nearly a century. As a legislator, Charles has championed gun reform, voting rights, labor laws, and more.
Charles is exactly the kind of candidate we need in the Senate. And he's the right choice to take on Mitch McConnell. **With his primary coming up on Tuesday, we're running out of time to give him our support.**
**[Splitting a gift between Charles Booker and People First Future will help make sure Charles has the resources he needs to take on Mitch McConnell — and win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17924702/211061576/622717348?refcode=em20200618-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEzYTFkOC1hOGIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4liHto0w3ZUhdrwOPC87ERenaSs78hwfimr4UkE2nAc=)**
Let's help Charles win on Tuesday,
Julián
[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17924703/211061577/622717348?refcode=em20200618-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWEzYTFkOC1hOGIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4liHto0w3ZUhdrwOPC87ERenaSs78hwfimr4UkE2nAc=)

body:
I wanted to reach out and let you know that I read your responses and know how these issues firsthand affect our community and our families. [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=a238ec4504a9409080bb3b05428e898d&_e=B2F0xF_E5-XZnDT9zDyBrdPB5nOnUrGFtS4Rk7YTpgudmf7yGAXLMV8ELzRmlOITApuKNEbDqkwOSToRidJKKSeA0TMVV6INiqkov5IXKaRUAV1W8TAIOx_kcVWTubFHRgp6RPmF_tSOTVyduSBCOo-DwE2T3PDG8oDwDPZTscvvjHnsra1hO-iYkmI6RC6YqlpFicjIJEpSHLqqygaoAatEr6KUGxI_01MZ84ZWVFQBuj1pP2X4gyXbujd6cOhCHn2h6dZeu7OG2-b2M76MmvnRxczoFDjpPVnRFqoBb7XWHwkzy0s5rumH4BcPV8llyu27aGy59f3hDVZN1pKA2A%3D%3D) Friend, I wanted to reach out and let you know that I read your responses and know how these issues firsthand affect our community and our families. From lowering prescription drug costs to supporting free trade agreements like the USMCA that help America’s farmers and manufacturers, I will continue to keep the best interests of my constituents in mind when making the tough decisions. Friend, I wanted to reach out and let you know that I read your responses and know how these issues firsthand affect our community and our families. From lowering prescription drug costs to supporting free trade agreements like the USMCA that help America’s farmers and manufacturers, I will continue to keep the best interests of my constituents in mind when making the tough decisions. My team and I are building an army of grassroots supporters that will help us end the scourge of socialist policies in Pennsylvania and America. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: 500 Words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bill Bryant**
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | In April 2018, at the suggestion of several supporters, I emailed my first “500 Words”, an update of what I’m doing, reading and thinking about, and said I’d do it again if enough people wanted me to. Scores responded “yes”, so I sent a second, and people asked me to keep ‘em coming. Here’s No. 5 [**You can access previous editions here.**](https://twitter.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c5ac11f23df6ef9dfb9e604c5&id=51cd0f8324&e=ef726ca89e)

This edition is a bit different: it focuses entirely on what I’m thinking.

You are receiving this because at some point you were identified as a supporter, someone who wants to keep in touch, or you asked to be added to the list. If you know somebody who would like to receive this, have them email me at [**billbryantwa@gmail.com**](mailto:billbryantwa@gmail.com). If you want to unsubscribe, please click the unsubscribe link at the bottom.
---
| |
## **WHAT I'M THINKING**
---
| The state has less money because of the COVID-19 lockdown. To deal with the shortfall, the governor has cancelled some raises and asked departments to identify 15% budget cuts. Democratic leaders are proposing new taxes. Some legislators are calling for a special session.

As I watch the unfolding scene, I wish I could call Governor Inslee and offer my thoughts. But as his former opponent, I don’t think he would welcome my call. I’m hoping you will call.

Why now? Because even with reduced revenues, at the end of 2020 the state will still collect over 10% more than it did just four years ago. That balance does not require across-the-board budget cuts, certainly not new taxes. Across-the-board cuts shield our elected officials from the flak that comes with making the hard decisions about what’s important. We elect them to make those decisions and now is the time for them to do it. This fall in revenue provides them the opportunity to reset priorities, update how government delivers services, and make investments that propel our state forward.

Now is not a moment for lazy budget tinkering. Now is the moment to break new ground.

The governor should be exploring how innovation & technology could enable us to deliver better services, faster. He should determine which programs are truly helping people, and not cut them but increase their funding if more funding will provide more help. He should decide which programs and agencies to eliminate.

Let’s put everything on the table.

This is our moment to ask whether Washington needs 298 school districts, each with their own administrative overhead, or whether money spent on redundant administration could be better spent by principals on teachers and students. This is the time to ask whether we need a Department of Ecology and a Department of Natural Resources and a Department of Fish and Wildlife. It is the time to spotlight which funds spent by the Department of Social and Health Services are helping people, and which are feeding a bureaucracy.

This is our moment to invest in projects that provide jobs and strengthen our state now and into the future. We should build a Columbia Science Center in the Tri Cities that, with Battelle, US Department of Energy, Delta High School, colleges and universities, will be our campus for environmental, climate, energy and modular nuclear education and research. We should build a new SR18 four-lane freeway connecting I-90 (North Bend) to I-5 Dupont (south of Fort Lewis), and a third Clark Co. bridge across the Columbia River. We should build water reservoirs in the Cascades. Now is the moment to provide every child with basic medical and dental care, and only fund those homelessness programs proven to lift people off our streets.

This requires an entirely new budget and government.

Legislators cannot reprioritize and restructure government in a special session. That can only be done by a governor who opens the session with a plan he has already built support behind. Imagine, done right, a special session could be our launch pad. The governor needs to hear that with so many people struggling financially, now is not the time for a special session that lunges us backward into more taxes, more bureaucracy.

Now is the time to Break New Ground. #BreakNewGround \- Bill
---

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17925821/211092034/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODg3NTMxMi1iNWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnmFVRKpLWngENLyH3pYDr3sQZoiNwGNROs9EtoB1ik=&emci=8aac2b6b-afb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=78875312-b5b1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)
I'm elated, friend.

This morning, the Supreme Court blocked the Trump Administration from cruelly putting to end DACA protections for over 800,000 young immigrants who grew up in the United States and call this their home.

From now on when Dreamers say “home is here,” it takes on a whole new meaning.

I'm a first generation Mexican American, daughter of immigrant parents, and I know first hand that immigrants have made our community and country great, and will continue to do so. And it's why I fought so hard to protect Dreamers from deportation as San Diego’s City Council President.

**But we also need to be very clear that this decision is not a permanent solution.** There's much more work left to do to ensure that Dreamers who call this country home can do so on a permanent basis. In Congress, I look forward to continuing the work done to pass the Dream and Promise Act which would create a pathway to citizenship.

**[With Trump and the Republicans at the helm, this fight will require all hands on deck. So today, I am asking you to join me in reaffirming your commitment to passing the Dream and Promise Act to provide a clear pathway to citizenship for our dreamers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17925822/211092035/-237501083?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODg3NTMxMi1iNWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnmFVRKpLWngENLyH3pYDr3sQZoiNwGNROs9EtoB1ik=&emci=8aac2b6b-afb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=78875312-b5b1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)**

Thank you, friend.

La lucha sigue
(_the fight continues_)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200618-all-a)**

** **

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17925823/211092036/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODg3NTMxMi1iNWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnmFVRKpLWngENLyH3pYDr3sQZoiNwGNROs9EtoB1ik=&emci=8aac2b6b-afb1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=78875312-b5b1-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864) Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community.

_**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17925824/211092037/1147193815?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODg3NTMxMi1iNWIxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnmFVRKpLWngENLyH3pYDr3sQZoiNwGNROs9EtoB1ik=). name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: The Next 24 Hours - End Walz' Emergency Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_next_24_hours&n=1)
---
Peter -- The next 24 hours are crucial. Either Minnesota will endure another month of Governor Walz' illegal unilateral rule making or the Republican Senate will finally stand up and **refuse to cut more deals with the Democrats** until the House ends Walz' powers. Here's what we know is at stake... Walz and Democrats want to pass spur-of-the-moment criminal justice reforms, $2 Billion in bonding debt and a **$300 Million bailout to Jacob Frey**. You heard that correctly. Minnesota taxpayers may be on the hook to bail out Minneapolis to the tune of $300 Million because of Jacob Frey's stand down orders and incompetence. But for the first time since I've been involved in politics, Republicans have the edge in negotiations. The Governor called a Special Session and can't dictate what gets heard or how long the session will last. And Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka is on record multiple times this week for saying they will adjourn on Friday...in about 24 hours! **The Republican Senate does NOT have to pass a single piece of legislation, compromise on a single dollar of bonding debt or bail Frey out with a single dollar of taxpayer funds if the Democrat House WILL NOT vote to terminate Walz' emergency powers.** If Gazelka compromises at all, he's just as guilty as the Democrats for the business closures and high unemployment that will come from another month of this illegal shutdown! Unfortunately, we've been let down too many times in the past by Gazelka and company. So we aren't taking anything for granted. Yesterday, thanks to your generous contributions, we were able to drop lit to voters in Gazelka's district about his "Deal with Democrats". Did you know [Paul Gazelka has a Republican primary challenger](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=Q7oBj8v5rCLq-JG6S6UbKYLnulKxeRcISAAmOAMLZeBhBn53tWY_eUer3WZWFTXMR8No6aVU9XVIy5BXTQBJaleFMviuajtJK0lHiLtu7jqUP5qIRNm3K8NPQCc6mD4x9B6Yapqt0RUtpAxKFJCBuzQyGiMGOqLYc2q5zdC9214&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_next_24_hours&n=2)? He better be paying attention! Right now we have door knockers and phone callers working around the clock, but nothing beats you contacting Gazelka yourself. **Reach out to Senator Paul Gazelka today and tell him:** 1\. Stop making deals with Democrats with a massive debt bill 2\. Tell the Democrats in the House to end Walz' powers or you will adjourn 3\. Don't bail out Jacob Frey with OUR money!
## Sen Paul Gazelka
## 651-296-4875
## [Email Gazelka here](mailto:sd09iq@mnsenate.lmhostediq.com)
**In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_next_24_hours&n=3).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_next_24_hours&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=the_next_24_hours&n=5), software for leaders.
