name: =?utf-8?B?VGVhbSBTw6FuY2hleg==?=
subject: A new way of policing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
In the wake of George Floyd's death at the hands of a Minnesota police officer, we have seen Americans calling for police reform in every state. From protests in major cities to single-person marches in small towns, this country is ready for substantive police reform on a national level.

That's because our law enforcement has unjustly targeted Black people for far too long, often using excessive force when unnecessary.

Linda, like so many Americans, is ready to see police reform. That's why she supports the Justice in Policing Act, which, among other things, would end the use of chokeholds, establish a National Police Misconduct Registry, and ban no-knock warrants for drug-related offenses.

Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the Justice in Policing Act to demand Congress makes needed changes in our law enforcement?

With momentum on our side, now is the time to take Congressional action and reform our system of policing.

Will you call for more just law enforcement by signing your name?

Thank you,

-- Team Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/h1y7E9tu4jRK2JUgNK7hr8cfD1yF0dOX7hCfVzRJlVY=/0R70LiVxDwB6zAdQg2H7y_WJTBoF1NWf9BWWcMGnzfE=.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: My Poll Results . . .
body:
With 137 days until the November Elections, we’ve opened up a MASSIVE lead over the Democrat I’m running again, “Lazy” Lois Frankel.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-380438-896213-5048989-5aeecf93e4-f3216e3700)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-380438-896213-5048988-99b564a683-f3216e3700) With 137 days until the November Elections, we’ve opened up a MASSIVE lead over the Democrat I’m running against, “Lazy” Lois Frankel.

**We’re now NINE points ahead – adding another three points from our poll in February!**

[**Help me make it a BLOWOUT by donating today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-380438-896213-5048988-99b564a683-f3216e3700)

We’re finishing up our first campaign ad and we’ll need to reach hundreds of thousands of voters on an ongoing basis until the election.

[**Can you chip in $25 to get our ads in front of 1,000 voters?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-380438-896213-5048988-99b564a683-f3216e3700)

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-380438-896213-5048988-99b564a683-f3216e3700)

If you can donate today, you’ll get an exclusive first look at the new ads before they run.

We’re just 12 days away from the end of the quarter and we need to raise another $47,000 to hit our goal.

Please chip into today with all that you can donate.

Now back to the poll results . . .

Where I’m running in Florida 21, it’s all about the “NPA's”, which are the voters with no party affiliation, and there are 158,000 of them . . . more than registered Republicans in the district!

Among the NPA’s, Lois Frankel has 19% support . . .

**My campaign has 65% support!**

I’m also thankful for the sky-high support among Republicans voters at 92.5%!

And here was the surprise, **among Democrat voters, my campaign has 22% support!**

There’s much more to the pull, but we can’t give it all away just yet . . . so stay tuned for more results and more polls as well.

The bottom line is this: this race is not only winnable, **we can dominate it and take back President and Mrs. Trump’s home district!**

[**But your ongoing support is needed so please help us get the ads up and remember, for each $25 you donate, we can get the ad in front of 1,000 voters!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-380438-896213-5048988-99b564a683-f3216e3700)

Thanks again for all that you do and for making this a wining campaign!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-380438-896213-5048988-99b564a683-f3216e3700)

body:
| | | |
---
| | | This is an incredibly exciting time of year. We are less than 50 days to the August primary, and we are back on the road covering the district from top to bottom. It feels so good to be seeing the faces of our friends and supporters across the district and having the opportunity to meet and make new friends every place we visit.

[Will you help us put gas in our tank? Anything helps. $100, $50, or even $10. ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=81398b987b&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| Thanks to Kansas Farm Bureau we continue to meet with more and more Kansans who are telling us they are ready for a change. These hard-working, dedicated Kansans share our vision for keeping Kansas red in November.
---
| [$100 = 3 tanks of gas!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0c883a62e8&e=1050d051da "$100 = 3 tanks of gas!")
---
|

|
---
---
| Jake LaTurner is the strong, conservative Kansan we can TRUST as our Republican nominee. Every visit we make brings more and more support to the campaign. Conservatives across Kansas are standing with Jake along with _**Kansas Farm Bureau, Kansans for Life, Family Policy Alliance of Kansas, National Association for Gun Rights, and a long list of leaders throughout the 2nd District.**_

We will continue to work harder than any candidate in this race, and would really appreciate any help you can give us so we can keep putting gas in the tank and getting our message to as many Kansans as possible. Can we count on you to help us send a trusted conservative to Washington D.C.? Team LaTurner

| Indiana Republicans,

**We are minutes away from our first-ever televised and livestreamed Indiana Republican State Convention._And we want you to tune in to be part of history with us!_**

It starts at 5:30 p.m. ET/4:30 p.m. CT!

As a reminder, here are your viewing options tonight:
* Indianapolis: Watch on WISH-TV (Channel 8)
* South Bend: Watch on WHME-TV (Channel 46)
* Fort Wayne: Listen on WOWO (1190 AM/107.5 FM)
* Livestream: [I](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7320284994&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ndiana.gop/2020-convention-livestream](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a4f2af19f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
* Facebook Watch Party: [Facebook.com/indgop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8dcc497b90&e=1acd9bb3d6)

If you can’t join us from the beginning, don't worry -- you won't miss a thing! After the live event ends, we'll post the full video [here for you to watch](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a0cb091469&e=1acd9bb3d6).

**The clock is ticking, Hoosier Republicans -- so go find the best viewing spot, and we'll see you real soon!**

-Your Indiana Republican Party

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Pride was a protest -- and the fight goes on.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can make progress if we recommit to the fight today.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8068%2E868730%2E0KI8K9) Friend, Pride began as a protest in June 1969 -- and in June 2020, this Pride Month, the fight continues. More than five decades later, LGBTQ+ Americans are still fighting for their rights and, tragically, their lives. The Trump administration has gone to great lengths to target LGBTQ+ Americans and their health care, housing, and employment rights -- just last week, the administration announced a rollback of health care protections for transgender patients. Here in Washington state, we're fighting back: Right after the Trump administration announced their abhorrent and bigoted rollback, we responded by announcing a rule that would counteract Trump's dangerous one. Thanks to a new law I signed, Insurance Commissioner Mike Kreidler will be enacting an emergency rule to protect transgender Washingtonians' access to health care. It specifically prohibits discrimination by insurers -- because discrimination has no home in our state. **[I'm recommitting to the fight for LGBTQ+ people in Washington and across the country. Will you join me and show your support for the LGBTQ+ community by adding your name right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Support_LGBTQ_Americans_Today/?utm_source=ema_2020-06-18_pride&source=ema_2020-06-18_pride&utm_campaign=pride&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=8068%2E868730%2E0KI8K9)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Support_LGBTQ_Americans_Today/?utm_source=ema_2020-06-18_pride&source=ema_2020-06-18_pride&utm_campaign=pride&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8068%2E868730%2E0KI8K9)
---
We are seeing some progress across the country -- including this week's Supreme Court decision protecting many LGBTQ+ Americans from discrimination in the workplace. This monumental decision ends generations of employment discrimination that far too many Americans have experienced firsthand -- but we know there is more we must do.
That's why I was proud to appoint 15 people to serve on Washington's new LGBTQ+ Commission this winter. This incredibly diverse group will identify the needs of the LGBTQ+ community and advocate for equity and inclusion in all aspects of state government. And I was thrilled to appoint Washington's first two openly LGBTQ+ judges to our state supreme court in my tenure as governor -- it's one more important step toward building a justice system that works for all.
That's in addition to signing the _Nikki Kuhnhausen Act_ , a law that prevents individuals from using the "gay panic defense" -- blaming a victim's gender identity or sexual orientation to justify violence. Nikki was only 18 when a man she met on social media found out she was transgender and murdered her.
**While the Trump administration is failing us in Washington, D.C., I will continue to fight for LGBTQ+ rights here in Washington state. But I need you to commit to that work with me:[Add your name to join me in standing up for LGBTQ+ Americans this Pride Month and every month.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Support_LGBTQ_Americans_Today/?utm_source=ema_2020-06-18_pride&source=ema_2020-06-18_pride&utm_campaign=pride&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=8068%2E868730%2E0KI8K9)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/Support_LGBTQ_Americans_Today/?utm_source=ema_2020-06-18_pride&source=ema_2020-06-18_pride&utm_campaign=pride&utm_medium=ema&t=7&akid=8068%2E868730%2E0KI8K9)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=8068%2E868730%2E0KI8K9). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---
All content (C) 2020 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved

Our primary run was a fight, Peter, but our challenge does not end there--we still have a long way to go.

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark your calendars: Online Town Hall on Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Just because we're physically distancing doesn't mean we can't talk to one another -- or to our elected officials.

Senator Mark Warner is holding another Facebook Live Town Hall for his constituents on Monday, June 22, 2020. There, he'll answer your questions and talk about what he's been working on in the Senate. This event is free and open to all! Here are the details: | **Facebook Live Town Hall with Senator Mark Warner**
Monday, June 22, 2020
5:45 PM ET
**[Click here to RSVP](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d433/53d9897e/54b5a092/1c8841bc/49038723/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/282059/")**
---
Although this event is hosted on Facebook, you do **not** need a Facebook account to access the town hall. If you already have a question for Mark, please respond directly to this email. He's looking forward to updating everyone on what he's been working on and making sure his constituents have the resources and information they need.

We hope you'll join us on Monday! **[Click here to sign up.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d433/53d9897e/54b5a092/1c8841bc/49038723/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/282059/")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

body:
we must stand up to China [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=fd0e8f4738d94ea993eb950149e5cb5b&_e=C3DNK_eO03-BrAH9m4fSmmHstFu-jVcMwKgTGeOH7maqnXZfiV4AKec_8a2g63K4ut35yqOmEyuOguJyCs6CPZI2aw1F6EXGRKtSPXvCyFZsYg6Q5UUmf3NHP43ScA_UfHdVbzxUQfrIGZlaTg_w1JXVSGNOM7vWrzjFZEeo5m6Syzh9NMXXqaMI0OKJIFq9BLgb-Idvvs5g2kKtq2TdHUp3MM3kjIf5AdQ7ngsIEmtyZwz1X85ZlLSVli7w2ietNM3ihFEMmbHG0xb1hquGyIlKqTRrS0AKR2-GCynUONjsgj-Ov1NKYbE8FjZuNHecSUZ1pRSHxqS7e7BJvmOKRC80m0dktldwlfyrlrCVc9PgjAD2OKxjkqG5IwdBiA_CWoqqwg0gcI7xFAoN--n3uR6dbo_Mss7dV_9AzJnAofCwTaH1uQ3POVYuNhWNWyEJKgTYVg-Dlzt1i7Y0vT8ATMlORPc6Yl5CvN80QdBpI4M%3D) Friend, I just came across a poll that shows 62% of Americans believe that China is a dangerous threat to America.
**They’re absolutely right.**
This pandemic has weakened the world’s economies – ours included – giving China the perfect opportunity to flex its muscles again after President Trump spent the last three years leading American companies, workers, and their families on a historic run of economic growth and success.
**This historic winning streak isn’t over.** But it will be if our leaders in Congress don’t defend our nation against China’s aggressive campaign to kick the world’s economies while they’re down. [**STAND WITH ME AND PRESIDENT TRUMP AGAINST CHINA**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=fd0e8f4738d94ea993eb950149e5cb5b&_e=C3DNK_eO03-BrAH9m4fSmmHstFu-jVcMwKgTGeOH7maqnXZfiV4AKec_8a2g63K4ut35yqOmEyuOguJyCs6CPZI2aw1F6EXGRKtSPXvCyFZsYg6Q5UUmf3NHP43ScA_UfHdVbzxUQfrIGZlaTg_w1JXVSGNOM7vWrzjFZEeo5m6Syzh9NMXXqaMI0OKJIFq9BLgb-Idvvs5g2kKtq2TdHUp3MM3kjIf5AdQ7ngsIEmtyZwz1X85ZlLSVli7w2ietNM3ihFEMmbHG0xb1hquGyPgdCN0eZ-2TLqDaeZCJ8V0S6nHZDoMe2dY73J8yT5_zMx3jbdwiQjs6_WxhvLvnLri_XDWTRnx9FBVoRy9sgwdOLMnWAaNkmGmhD3mPSnQb1v0VTp7kcd4AIxPj-qhWpHn1x4CdvSfTGgNdkq8xXNgBst9mtOJHdE17XHnqAmbyglMEycYGwt9T_7RKtOZR-W84CGxRaWuFyKck1Nl0vUE%3D) I fought in Albany and in Washington to make sure that we start seeing more “Made in America'' labels on the products we use everyday – and we were even able to bring NY-22’s own Sherrill Manufacturing to the White House for President Trump’s Made in America Day in 2017!
**At the same time, I worked alongside the President to make sure that Americans know the TRUTH about China’s actions against our country, and I haven’t stopped since leaving Washington.**
China steals over $600 billion in intellectual property from American companies each year, they routinely devalue their own currency to boost demand for products made in China, and most recently, they threatened to cut off our access to critical pharmaceutical drugs – during a pandemic!
**Let’s do something about this, America. Here’s how we can take real steps to protect our nation for generations to come: **
By manufacturing pharmaceuticals and life-saving medical supplies here at home rather than on Chinese soil, we can break China’s deathgrip on critical supply chains that American companies and citizens rely on to survive.
_Republican Senator Tom Cotton is working on a bill right now that will accomplish that goal, and I look forward to fully supporting it once I’m back in Washington._
**Not only will this measure protect Americans against future pandemics, but it will create thousands of jobs right here within our borders at the same time – and that’s a win!** [**STAND WITH ME AND PRESIDENT TRUMP AGAINST CHINA**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=fd0e8f4738d94ea993eb950149e5cb5b&_e=C3DNK_eO03-BrAH9m4fSmmHstFu-jVcMwKgTGeOH7maqnXZfiV4AKec_8a2g63K4ut35yqOmEyuOguJyCs6CPZI2aw1F6EXGRKtSPXvCyFZsYg6Q5UUmf3NHP43ScA_UfHdVbzxUQfrIGZlaTg_w1JXVSGNOM7vWrzjFZEeo5m6Syzh9NMXXqaMI0OKJIFq9BLgb-Idvvs5g2kKtq2TdHUp3MM3kjIf5AdQ7ngsIEmtyZwz1X85ZlLSVli7w2ietNM3ihFEMmbHG0xb1hquGyKIDCTBK7Bw-5qpxiMLqFZ5d20nZQhQPoJAjWFizu9PVWVJhj8Va4veY2CduZXYBMqPrUlM3008EmfGYE1lcnLK7iNY-M4dS7YLcZYBmKV_RnfZNjge4rhsdF-qXG95sLQJrGkwpxkPtc9nPOWqDNFWVEiZRZTqs6A8QZSs0WZWvjkrC_ZyMNjli78Xty1UgQJrWirGCIWaJw8coFsendZc%3D) Our district and our country desperately need leadership and security in this fight against China – and we’re not seeing either of the two from Anthony Brindisi right now.
In fact, here’s a list of everything that Anthony Brindisi has done to protect us against China:
*
*
*

**I t’s empty – no surprise there!**
**Add your name below to join me as I stand with President Trump against the growing threat of China and to send a message to Washington that we can’t afford to wait on this issue.** [**STAND WITH ME AND PRESIDENT TRUMP AGAINST CHINA**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=fd0e8f4738d94ea993eb950149e5cb5b&_e=C3DNK_eO03-BrAH9m4fSmmHstFu-jVcMwKgTGeOH7maqnXZfiV4AKec_8a2g63K4ut35yqOmEyuOguJyCs6CPZI2aw1F6EXGRKtSPXvCyFZsYg6Q5UUmf3NHP43ScA_UfHdVbzxUQfrIGZlaTg_w1JXVSGNOM7vWrzjFZEeo5m6Syzh9NMXXqaMI0OKJIFq9BLgb-Idvvs5g2kKtq2TdHUp3MM3kjIf5AdQ7ngsIEmtyZwz1X85ZlLSVli7w2ietNM3ihFEMmbHG0xb1hquGyCFeYngwVyvIS4dB5CnVJ-9bNXovVZ4xuLyC5p4cYTF5hJ4fC87GC6dlkajHPDL7YezrYYNRWCEOxXekqhwxrZxTO6EIqakN3amxCHi_ujyz-8IwnrEf9l--Jhkq6lBNgS4wiFYgiTev0c7N2zcPhcYTrgxqB2P8xSmHQfkMvfek7bNAqtIM2K6SPb-JQ0EyDa3zf0sSLcjV8N9UKZVt3BY%3D) Thank you for standing with me, Claudia Tenney |

clean_body: we must stand up to China Friend, I just came across a poll that shows 62% of Americans believe that China is a dangerous threat to America. They’re absolutely right. This pandemic has weakened the world’s economies – ours included – giving China the perfect opportunity to flex its muscles again after President Trump spent the last three years leading American companies, workers, and their families on a historic run of economic growth and success. This historic winning streak isn’t over. But it will be if our leaders in Congress don’t defend our nation against China’s aggressive campaign to kick the world’s economies while they’re down. I fought in Albany and in Washington to make sure that we start seeing more “Made in America'' labels on the products we use everyday – and we were even able to bring NY-22’s own Sherrill Manufacturing to the White House for President Trump’s Made in America Day in 2017! At the same time, I worked alongside the President to make sure that Americans know the TRUTH about China’s actions against our country, and I haven’t stopped since leaving Washington. China steals over $600 billion in intellectual property from American companies each year, they routinely devalue their own currency to boost demand for products made in China, and most recently, they threatened to cut off our access to critical pharmaceutical drugs – during a pandemic! Let’s do something about this, America. Here’s how we can take real steps to protect our nation for generations to come: By manufacturing pharmaceuticals and life-saving medical supplies here at home rather than on Chinese soil, we can break China’s deathgrip on critical supply chains that American companies and citizens rely on to survive. Republican Senator Tom Cotton is working on a bill right now that will accomplish that goal, and I look forward to fully supporting it once I’m back in Washington. Not only will this measure protect Americans against future pandemics, but it will create thousands of jobs right here within our borders at the same time – and that’s a win! Our district and our country desperately need leadership and security in this fight against China – and we’re not seeing either of the two from Anthony Brindisi right now. In fact, here’s a list of everything that Anthony Brindisi has done to protect us against China: I t’s empty – no surprise there! Add your name below to join me as I stand with President Trump against the growing threat of China and to send a message to Washington that we can’t afford to wait on this issue.** Thank you for standing with me, Claudia Tenney | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | By law the maximum amount an individual may contribute is $2,800 for the primary and $2,800 for the general election. name: MJ Hegar
subject: These are some badass women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
And we're all running for office.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901a1/7f51f7bc/4eab101c/4ef6d9ab/3355413293/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901a1/7f51f7bc/4eab101c/4ef6d9aa/3355413293/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-badasswomen?refcode=email_20200618.2nd__1571__&amount=10")
---
Hey Peter,

I served three tours of duty for our country, so there's one thing I know very well: Being a public servant means taking an oath to support and defend our Constitution, and following through on it no matter what.

**That last part is important, y 'all: _no matter what._** But in just the last few months alone, I've watched politicians violate the oaths they took over and over again, putting politics over country -- and I am fed up.

I've got good news, though. Across the country, women like me who have served our country for years are running for office. Like me, they take their oath seriously, and that's why they're running to continue serving our country.

**[Will you pitch in right now to support them? Your contribution will be split between my campaign and the campaigns of Amy McGrath, Rep. Elaine Luria, Rep. Elissa Slotkin, Rep. Mikie Sherrill, Rep. Abigail Spanberger, Gina Ortiz Jones, and Jackie Gordon.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901a1/7f51f7bc/4eab101c/4ef6d9aa/3355413293/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-badasswomen?refcode=email_20200618.2nd__1571__&amount=10")**

Not only are these women dedicated public servants, but they are TOUGH. Each of these women have been fighting hard fights throughout their careers, and I know they'll continue to fight for their constituents in Washington.

But we can't do it without help from people like you. Each of us is facing down powerful special interests who will spend any amount to force real change-makers away from the decision table.

**[So I'm asking you to join me in supporting these badass women by splitting a donation among our campaigns. Will you pitch in right now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901a1/7f51f7bc/4eab101c/4ef6d9aa/3355413293/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-badasswomen?refcode=email_20200618.2nd__1571__&amount=10")**
Thanks, y'all.
MJ Hegar

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901a1/7f51f7bc/4eab101c/4ef6d9aa/3355413293/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-badasswomen?refcode=email_20200618.2nd__1571__&amount=10")**

|

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Biden can unite Democrats, Republicans, and Independents around climate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We built Evergreen Action for moments like this.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=746%2E53494%2E3Iy1U6) Friend, A new poll from our friends at Data for Progress reveals just how fired up Democrats are about clean energy and jobs: [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/385?t=3&akid=746%2E53494%2E3Iy1U6) **In fact, 75% of Democratic voters would be more likely to vote for Joe Biden in November's election if he makes an even stronger commitment to combating climate change.** Additional polling shows that environmental issues are one of Trump's biggest weaknesses. Voters disapprove of Trump's climate change denial and his corrupt Big Oil appointees. In fact, recent polling shows that Trump is 20 percentage points behind Biden on the question of who would do a better job on the environment, including addressing climate change. This is an enormous opportunity for Vice President Biden to unite Democrats, Independents, and Republicans and to bring climate leadership to the White House. Joe Biden can -- and should -- take on Trump with a bold vision for climate action. Now it's our turn to make sure he knows it. **[We built Evergreen Action to mobilize in moments like this: Add your name here to urge Biden to take on Trump with a bold vision for climate action. Our future depends on it.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/385?t=4&akid=746%2E53494%2E3Iy1U6)** | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/385?t=5&akid=746%2E53494%2E3Iy1U6)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: An update on reopening America!
body:
Americans are ready to get back to work. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a15962dc7f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 18, 2020
---
| | |
# **An update on reopening America!**

**Americans are ready** to get back to work. Today, fewer than 6 percent of Americans tested each week are found to have the Coronavirus. Daily average case rates continue to fall, and all 50 states have begun reopening in a safe and responsible manner.

**Small businesses** are leading this comeback. During the height of the pandemic, more than 80 percent of them were forced to close temporarily as Americans helped slow the spread of COVID-19. To help these companies recover and avoid bankruptcy, state leaders must continue to follow President Trump’s [Guidelines for Opening Up America Again](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a475875eaf&e=3ee4985eea).

**Endless lockdowns** are not an option.

**President Trump hosted** a group of these small business leaders for a roundtable at the White House today. Joining him were Gov. Pete Ricketts of Nebraska and Gov. Kevin Stitt of Oklahoma. “America is better supplied and more prepared to reenter than, I would say, just about any other place,” the President said.

🎬 [President Trump: We’ve saved 50 million American jobs ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=304cc6f089&e=3ee4985eea)

**The****Paycheck Protection Program**(PPP), signed into law by President Trump in March and replenished in April, has sustained millions of small businesses and protected their employees during the pandemic. The President approved more than $670 billion for the PPP, along with $60 billion for the SBA’s Disaster Loan Program.

**Vice President Mike Pence,** head of the White House’s Coronavirus Task Force, traveled to Iowa earlier this week and visited Michigan today, where he toured two manufacturing companies. In May, the American manufacturing sector created 225,000 new jobs—part of the record-breaking 2.5 million jobs added last month.

**“During one** of the most challenging times in our Nation,” the Vice President tweeted, “it was the people who make things & the people who grow things who stepped up.”

[PHOTOS: VP Pence visits Winnebago Industries in Iowa](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8090742bcd&e=3ee4985eea)

**As our economy** comes back**,** it’s vital that we continue to work together, get people back to work, and protect our most vulnerable citizens. Regrettably, too many politicians and pundits care more about exploiting fear than about reopening our country.

**After weeks** of condoning mass protests and turning a blind eye to violent rioters, many Democrats are once again calling for stricter lockdowns on law-abiding residents.

**Enough is enough**. Working Americans stepped up when the Coronavirus struck, staying home and often losing their jobs to help slow the spread of disease. They aren’t asking for much now—only a chance to get back to work and provide for their families.

**President Trump** hears them. It’s time to safely reopen America for business.

🎬 [President Trump: The economic revival is beginning!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28c004c212&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ:**[There is no Coronavirus “second wave,” VP Pence says](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=37ad201800&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump disembarks Marine One on the South Lawn of the White House** | June 14, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21c49f427b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1750b12369&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=872783b226)

name: Christy Smith
subject: There's a blood shortage. But some people are wrongfully banned from donating.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Normally, my campaign calendar for June would be full of Pride parades and festivals -- celebrating the resiliency of the LGBTQ community and recommiting to the work of equality.

But with the COVID-19 pandemic, many of those celebrations have been put on hold. And at a time when folks want to help each other as much as possible, there is still a barrier many face in helping others: **The Food and Drug Administration still has a ban on gay and queer men donating blood.**

There's a national blood shortage during this global pandemic, and advancements in our science and testing capabilities render these bans outdated and discriminatory.

**[Join LGBTQ elected officials, leaders, and allies and call on the FDA to lift the ban on gay and queer men donating blood!](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba5d/29776869/9dc6d58/569ecbb3/1353063189/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MThfbGdidHFqYS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://www.paction.us/endtheban/em20_200618_lgbtqja-full")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba5d/29776869/9dc6d58/569ecbb3/1353063189/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MThfbGdidHFqYS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://www.paction.us/endtheban/em20_200618_lgbtqja-full") The LGBTQ community won a major victory on Monday when the Supreme Court ruled that federal civil rights laws protect gay and transgender Americans in the workplace from being fired because of their identity. But the blood donation ban shows that we have a long way to go towards bringing anti-LGBTQ discrimination to an end.

**Lifting this ban is a no-brainer -- it's well overdue and just makes sense.**

The ban is even affecting a critical avenue for battling COVID-19 -- plasma donations. Researchers are asking for people who've recovered from the virus to donate plasma so they can study the antibodies. But gay and queer men are being rejected as donors.

Health experts agree that the ban is outdated, unscientific, and discriminatory. The FDA itself has proven they have little cause except homophobia when they reduced their one-year abstinence requirement for queer men to three months at the start of the pandemic.

It's time for the FDA to lift this ban completely. We can work together to save more lives, help more people, and include everyone in the effort to end this pandemic.

**[Stand with the LGBTQ community today and add your name to this petition calling for the FDA to lift the ban on gay and queer men donating blood.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba5d/29776869/9dc6d58/569ecbb3/1353063189/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MThfbGdidHFqYS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://www.paction.us/endtheban/em20_200618_lgbtqja-full")**

Thanks for taking action -- this is important.

\-- Christy

|
[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba5d/29776869/9dc6d58/569ecb8c/1353063189/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MThfbGdidHFqYS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200618_lgbtqja-full")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba5d/29776869/9dc6d58/569ecb8c/1353063189/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MThfbGdidHFqYS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy?refcode=em20_200618_lgbtqja-full")

[**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba5d/29776869/9dc6d58/569ecb8f/1353063189/VEsO/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |
clean_body: | []() | | Peter -- Normally, my campaign calendar for June would be full of Pride parades and festivals -- celebrating the resiliency of the LGBTQ community and recommiting to the work of equality. But with the COVID-19 pandemic, many of those celebrations have been put on hold. And at a time when folks want to help each other as much as possible, there is still a barrier many face in helping others: The Food and Drug Administration still has a ban on gay and queer men donating blood. There's a national blood shortage during this global pandemic, and advancements in our science and testing capabilities render these bans outdated and discriminatory. "" "" The LGBTQ community won a major victory on Monday when the Supreme Court ruled that federal civil rights laws protect gay and transgender Americans in the workplace from being fired because of their identity. But the blood donation ban shows that we have a long way to go towards bringing anti-LGBTQ discrimination to an end. Lifting this ban is a no-brainer -- it's well overdue and just makes sense. The ban is even affecting a critical avenue for battling COVID-19 -- plasma donations. Researchers are asking for people who've recovered from the virus to donate plasma so they can study the antibodies. But gay and queer men are being rejected as donors. Health experts agree that the ban is outdated, unscientific, and discriminatory. The FDA itself has proven they have little cause except homophobia when they reduced their one-year abstinence requirement for queer men to three months at the start of the pandemic. It's time for the FDA to lift this ban completely. We can work together to save more lives, help more people, and include everyone in the effort to end this pandemic. "" Thanks for taking action -- this is important. \-- Christy | "" Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. "" | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Today, I'm proud to endorse Charles Booker for Senate in Kentucky. He's a state representative who fights for working people and the right Democrat to beat Mitch McConnell. I'm ready to fight along... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852577d/45c30650/1c98b59ec/66e9e08d/1162357632/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
This November, if Democrats play our cards right (and persist), we won't just take back control of the U.S. Senate from Mitch McConnell.

We'll take Mitch McConnell's Senate seat, too.

Today, I'm proud to endorse Charles Booker for Senate in Kentucky. He's a state representative who fights for working people and he's the right Democrat to beat Mitch McConnell.

I'm ready to fight alongside Charles Booker in the United States Senate to root out corruption, build a better future for all our kids, dismantle systemic racism, and make big, structural change for working people.

But first, he has to get through Tuesday's primary election. He has the momentum right now, but he's up against an extremely well-funded opponent.

**Tuesday's primary could be decided by just a few thousand votes -- so the outreach that Charles Booker's campaign can run in the next few days will make all the difference.

[If you can, please split a contribution of $2 or whatever makes sense to you between Charles Booker's campaign and Warren Democrats before Tuesday's primary, so we can elect Democrats like him up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852577d/45c30650/1c98b59ec/66e9e08c/1162357632/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWNiIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMxMkZfRU5EX0FOTl9FXzIwMjAwNjE4X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-cb?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS12F_END_ANN_E_20200618_V1S3_P")**

As a lifelong Kentuckian, Charles Booker has seen how Mitch McConnell and Washington work great for the billionaires and giant corporations, but not so much for the people of Kentucky.

Kentucky families deserve a senator who will listen and get things done, and that's exactly what Charles Booker has done his entire career at every level of government.

He fights from the heart because he knows what's at stake for working people in the choices that our leaders make. He grew up in one of Kentucky's lowest-income ZIP codes. Sometimes, he went hungry. Sometimes, he had to ration his insulin.

Now, he's fighting for a country where everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected, has a chance to thrive -- with Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and big, structural change across the board.

As a state legislator, he's fought for gun violence prevention, criminal justice reform, voting rights, and more. He's helped get results for working people, including a bipartisan bill expanding emergency access to insulin.

And in the past few weeks, he's joined protestors in Louisville on the front lines of the fight to dismantle systemic racism and root out white supremacy.

He won't just nibble around the edges of the problems we face. He'll make real change. And he'll make us proud every day that he serves in the Senate.

But first, we need to do everything we can to help him win Tuesday's primary.

**It's crunch time. The amount of money that Charles raises today will help decide how much he can invest in getting out the vote -- and we can't leave any stone unturned.

[Help make sure that Charles Booker wins on Tuesday and beats Mitch McConnell in November. Chip in $2 or whatever you can to support him and Democrats fighting for bold reform across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852577d/45c30650/1c98b59ec/66e9e08c/1162357632/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWNiIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMxMkZfRU5EX0FOTl9FXzIwMjAwNjE4X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-cb?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS12F_END_ANN_E_20200618_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852577d/45c30650/1c98b59ec/66e9e08c/1162357632/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWNiIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMxMkZfRU5EX0FOTl9FXzIwMjAwNjE4X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-cb?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS12F_END_ANN_E_20200618_V1S3_P")
